channel.title: Claude Usage Widget — macOS
channel.description: Auto-update feed for the macOS native build.

item.title: Version 1.2.0
item.description:
UX upgrade — ETA, sparkline, A2Z typography, and a roomier layout

  • Burn-rate ETA — predicts when the session limit will be hit at current pace
  • 7-day Sparkline trend in the Weekly Limits card (history saved to ~/.claude-usage-widget-history.json)
  • Menu Bar Text format picker — Off / % / Time / Both
  • Warning pulse — menu bar icon breathes at ≥80%, session ring gets a soft glow halo
  • Skeleton loading + spring-animated session ring with numericText transition
  • Refreshed onboarding — animated ring hero and gradient CTA
  • 에이투지체 (A2Z) typography across the popover, wider 400 px layout, larger ring & progress bars
  • Popover background switched from glassmorphism blur to solid off-white / dark surface
  • Settings switches with Claude-orange tint, category icons (SF Symbols)
  • Accessibility labels, ⌘Q quit shortcut, system Reduce Motion honoured
  • Fixed deprecated NSWorkspace.launchApplication and stale footer version label

item.title: Version 1.1.0
item.description:
Major UI overhaul + Sparkle auto-update + Universal Binary

  • Sparkle auto-update (signed via EdDSA)
  • Launch at Login
  • Usage Alerts at 80% / 90% session thresholds
  • Universal Binary (Apple Silicon + Intel)
  • Circular session ring with adaptive color coding
  • Menu bar icon color follows current usage
  • Settings reorganized into Account / General / Notifications / Updates
  • Mini / Full mode toggle, Buddy show/hide, Compact mode
  • Light & Dark mode adaptive theme
  • First-run onboarding (auto-skipped for existing users)
  • Open Terminal button when credentials missing
  • Keyboard shortcuts: ⌘R refresh, ⌘, settings
  • API jitter + 2×→16× exponential backoff for rate-limit safety
  • Bundle ID unified to com.innohi.claudeusagewidget

item.title: Version 1.0.0
item.description:
Initial Sparkle release

  • Auto-update via Sparkle (this release)
  • Launch at Login support
  • Mini/Full mode toggle (hide menu-bar % text)
  • API jitter + exponential backoff for rate-limit safety
  • Notarized Developer ID build
